enrichment.summary: Kyle gives a casual life update from Boulder, explaining why he missed several days of uploading (accidentally uploaded a duplicate video). He talks about smoking weed and hash oil with his roommate, working on his website/YouTube page, going on his first motorbike ride in the mountains, and dealing with a nagging shoulder injury from a bench press strain the previous October.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Missing one day makes it too easy to miss every day after — a slippery slope
Loves it; finds the power and mountain terrain thrilling
Shoulders require extra care; warns against jumping back into bench press after a long break

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Living in Boulder, I feel like I totally fell off the horse.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It's been a few days where I did not upload a video.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: If you miss one day of uploading videos, then you can miss every day after that easily.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I missed uploading a video because I uploaded the same video twice by mistake.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I thought I recorded a new video but ended up trying to upload the same video that was already uploaded.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I got confused and thought something was wrong with the computer.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Sometimes you just keep trying to upload videos but give up.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to get back to uploading videos again.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Last time I uploaded a video, I was smoking a lot of hash and marijuana.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My roommate gives me a big amount of weed every weekend.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: When I run out of weed, my roommate gives me more.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Mixing weed with hash gets me really high.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm really high right now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My hybrid hash oil is getting empty.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I bought two more grams of hash oil, one hybrid and one Sativa.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Sativa gives you energy or something like that.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've been working on a page on my website.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Maybe I'll finish the website page today.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Once I finish my YouTube page, I'll start uploading a lot of videos.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Uploading a lot of videos will be fun.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went on a motorbike ride on Saturday, and it was fun.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: It was my first motorbike ride in Boulder.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Riding a motorbike up a mountain lets you feel the power and the rocks it spits up behind you.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Riding a motorbike is awesome.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I came up with the idea to ride my motorbike up the mountains, run to the top, and then ride back.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Using a motorbike is way cheaper than a car.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to get a bike for this plan.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to do some requested videos now.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I need to get exercise because my shoulder is getting worse.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: My shoulder hurts, and I can't move it without pain.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I don't know how my shoulder injury happened.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The only thing I can tie the shoulder pain to is pulling some muscles last October at the gym.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I wasn't exercising enough, and then I pressed too much at the gym.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The shoulder pain only lasted 20 minutes initially but started hurting again weeks later.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: You have to be careful with shoulders.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Summer is here.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think that's all I have to say.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I'm going to work on requested videos now.
